ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polling_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling project */,
  "polling_firm" TEXT /* Name of the polling firm conducting the project */,
  "commissioners" TEXT /* Commissioners responsible for the project */,
  "fieldwork_start" TEXT /* Start date of fieldwork */,
  "fieldwork_end" TEXT /* End date of fieldwork */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the polling (e.g., National) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples collected */,
  "sample_size_qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the sample size */,
  "participation" TEXT /* Type of participation in the study */,
  "precision" TEXT /* Precision of the polling results */,
  "sampling_technique" TEXT /* Sampling technique used in the project */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the project */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_projects_scope FOREIGN KEY ("scope") REFERENCES scopes ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_projects_sample_size FOREIGN KEY ("sample_size") REFERENCES sample_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_projects_polling_firm FOREIGN KEY ("polling_firm") REFERENCES polling_firms ("firm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_projects_commissioners FOREIGN KEY ("commissioners") REFERENCES commissioners ("commissioner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_projects_precision FOREIGN KEY ("precision") REFERENCES precision_levels ("precision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_firms" (
  "firm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling firm */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling firm */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the polling firm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commissioners" (
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commissioner */,
  "commissioner_name" TEXT /* Name of the commissioner */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the commissioner represents */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commissioner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the polling project this result belongs to */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of support for the party */,
  "other" TEXT /* Data on any other parties or independents not listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES polling_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_results_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES political_parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participation_types" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation type */,
  "participation_type" TEXT /* Name of the participation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the participation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precision_levels" (
  "precision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precision level */,
  "precision_value" TEXT /* Precision value (e.g., 0.1%, 1%) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the precision level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scopes" (
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the scope */,
  "scope_description" TEXT /* Description of the scope (e.g., National) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sample size */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* The number representing the sample size */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification or conditions for the sample size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fieldwork_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the fieldwork period */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the polling project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of fieldwork */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of fieldwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fieldwork_periods_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES polling_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES polling_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the polling project */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report creation */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the polling results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES polling_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the role assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
